Home Product sliding windows TOT SD PLUS
BIS Certified

sliding

TOT SD PLUS

Versatile, secure, and efficient — the TOT SD PLUS aluminium sliding windows are designed to adapt to every home. Offering advanced safety features and customizable options, they combine strength with style for modern living.

Premium Quality Assured

Tested & Certified for Indian Climate Conditions

Key Features

Customizable Track Options

Multiple tracks to suit your space and requirements

Enhanced Safety & Security

Single and multipoint locking systems for extra protection

Energy-Efficient Glass Options

Choose from multiple glass types for better insulation and comfort

Request Quote

Product Specifications

Max Sash Height

2400 mm

Max Sash Width

1200 mm

Glass Thickness Range

5mm - 20mm

Performance Parameters

Wind load 2 kpa

As per class C5 (BS EN12210 : 2000)

Air tightness 300 Pa

As per class 2 (BS EN12207 : 2000)

Water tightness 150 Pa

As per class 4A (BS EN12207 : 2000)

Joining Detail

WIDTH ON JAMB
Frame 2T- 70mm
Frame 3T- 106mm
FRAME CORNER JOINT 45°
SHUTTER CORNER JOINT 45°
SIGHT LINE 60mm

Popular Typology

Choose from our most popular window configurations designed for different architectural needs

2 Track 2 Glass Shutter Sliding Window

2 Track 4 Glass Shutter Sliding Window

3 Track 2 Glass Shutter + 1 Mesh Shutter Sliding Window

3 Track 4 Glass Shutter + 2 Mesh Shutter Sliding Window

2 Track 2 Glass Sliding Shutter + 1 Fix Shutter Window

3 Track 3 Glass Shutter Sliding Window

3 Track 6 Glass Shutter Sliding Window

2 Track 2 Glass Sliding Shutter + Bottom Fixed Window

2 Track 2 Glass Sliding Shutter + Top Fixed Window

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our TOT SD PLUS.

TOT SD PLUS offers 2-track, and 3-track configurations to suit different space requirements and usage patterns.

We support glass thickness ranging from 5mm to 20mm, including single glazed, double glazed, and laminated options.

The multi-point locking system secures the window at multiple points along the frame, providing enhanced security and weather sealing.

Still have Questions?

Our experts are here to help you make the right choice for your project.

Send Inquiry

Our Product Range

Every detail engineered for performance, durability, and design.

TOT SD NEXGEN

Central locking. Weather-resistant. Sturdy performance.

TOT SD LITE

Lightweight design. Cost-efficient. Smooth operation.

TOT SD PLUS

Customizable tracks. Enhanced security. Energy-efficient options.

TOT CS

Hassle-free installation. Multiple color options. Better ventilation.

TOT RL 80

High strength tested. Continuous design. Multiple handrail options.

TOT RL 125

Impact engineered. Greater height capacity. Wide glass customizations.

TOTALIS

Totalis by Hindalco Industries Limited supplies tested and certified aluminium extrusions and hardware components. Fabrication, assembling, installation, servicing, and warranty of the finished window system are the sole responsibility of the fabricator. Users acknowledge that their contractual relationship is with the fabricator. Please contact your fabricator for details on warranties and after-sales service
